# lib6502

This directory contains the MIT-licensed 6502 emulator used by ActionC64U host
verification tools. It is vendored here so the maintained ActionC64U and UDOS
builds do not depend on a retired sibling source tree.

The source is Ian Piumarta's `lib6502`, with the existing single-instruction
execution/disassembler adaptation described in `README.dg`. See
`COPYING.lib6502` for the license.
